title: HOUSING CHOICE VOUCHER PROGRAM - 211info
text: HOUSING AUTHORITY OF JACKSON COUNTY HOUSING CHOICE VOUCHER PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides assistance about information and acquisition of Section 8 vouchers and fields complaints about the program. Projected wait times for the program are 4-5 years. 2251 Table Rock Road Medford, OR 97501 Eligibility: Must meet income guidelines, pass a criminal background check, and have at least one family member who is a citizen or permanent resident of the US. Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-noon and 1pm-4:30pm. First Thursday of the month 10am-noon and 1pm-4:30pm Email (541) 779-5785 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 779-5785 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website to apply FEES: None for pre-application. Rent varies by unit and program. DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Jackson County SITE HOURS: Monday-Thursday 8am-4:30pm Services: Housing Complaints * Section 8 Housing Residents Section 8 Housing Choice Vouchers Section 8/Rental Assistance Program Rental Listings Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - SUBSIDIZED AND AFFORDABLE HOUSING If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. HOUSING AUTHORITY OF JACKSON COUNTY
